revolution.com.thesis_evidence_title: How we invest our time and capital
revolution.com.strategy_snippets: ["From getting America online to backing a new era of innovation and community, we invest in what's next\u2014and where it's happening.", "We started this firm with a simple conviction: innovation isn\u2019t confined to pre-selected pins on a map. Great companies\u2014and great communities\u2014can rise up anywhere. That idea has guided our approach to venture investing, real estate development, and hospitality.", "Whether we\u2019re backing a startup rethinking logistics in the Midwest or developing a resort that redefines cultural immersion in Costa Rica, we go where the potential is and help unlock it.", "We believe in showing up, listening closely, and partnering with people on the ground to create something that lasts, whether that\u2019s a business, a travel destination, or a broader movement. And because of our D.C. homebase, we also relentlessly champion policies that support those efforts.", "This isn\u2019t just about investing. It\u2019s about building. And it\u2019s about shaping an economy where more people in more places have the chance to thrive."]

moonfire.com.strategy_snippets: ["Running with the haystack metaphor, here\u2019s how we use automation and machine learning to find more needles in bigger haystacks, and save our investors from picking through the chaff.", "However, if we focus too much on making a big haystack \u2013 say we add a lot of new sources with a low signal to noise ratio (ie, lots of irrelevant companies) \u2013 it makes it difficult for a magnet to find the needles, no matter how good it is.", "It\u2019s a compromise, then, between two mistakes: do you use up more of the investor\u2019s time by making them look through more companies (because your model was too lenient), or risk missing out on really good companies (because your model was too strict).", "We only started running this machine learning pipeline in April, and it\u2019s been a game-changer. Not only can it find companies that investors might never have looked at, it can surface them earlier. It helps our investment team find founders that are a good fit and be the first to talk to them.", "Building the backbone of tomorrow's AI-driven digital world with robust, secure and scalable solutions."]

quona.com.strategy_snippets: ["Finance is the fuel that powers the global economic engine.Access to banking, credit and payment services are as fundamental to global multi-nationals as they are to community-focused small businesses.", "We believe that financial innovation is a catalyst for transformation from a have/have-not global financial system into one that is more equitable and affordable for everyone.", "We believe that innovation is as likely to sprout from S\u00e3o Paulo or Bangalore as it is from Silicon Valley or London. ventures.swisscom.com.strategy_snippets: ["We deliver superior returns and foster industry-leading innovation through investments across the full life cycle of high-potential startups.", "We typically invest in Swiss university spin-offs, with a sweet spot from Seed to Series C, and initial ticket sizes ranging from $2 million to $10 million, plus reserves for follow-on rounds. This approach provides the power and resources startups need to grow and succeed.", "We operate with an independent decision-making process, a dedicated team, and specific focus areas, allowing us to align with the needs of high-potential startups. We offer unparalleled support, making us a leading fund in Switzerland and Europe.", "In addition to the Swiss ecosystem, which receives 50% of our capital, we also focus on North America, Europe, and Israel. This strategy has enabled us to build a diverse and thriving portfolio.", "Our unique local expertise paired with a global perspective offers unique insights and opportunities, making us an ideal partner for Swiss companies seeking international expansion and companies looking for market entry in Switzerland and Europe."]

playground.global.strategy_snippets: ["We\u2019ve built companies, pushed the limits of technology, and tackled the same challenges as the founders we back. This dual perspective gives us deep technical insight, real-world empathy, and an unshakable belief that today\u2019s impossible ideas will define tomorrow\u2019s world.", "Innovation happens at the intersection of disciplines. We approach investing with a broad technical lens\u2014where advances in one domain, like next-generation computing, can unlock breakthroughs in others, from engineered biology to energy transition.", "We invest in technologies that matter\u2014breakthroughs solving fundamental challenges, not just chasing trends. By prioritizing meaningful advancements over fleeting buzz, we identify transformative opportunities others overlook.", "Playground is where breakthrough science turns into world-changing companies. We back the scientists and engineers redefining what\u2019s possible.", "We\u2019re entering the next great inflection point in compute. Playground backs the innovations pushing computing to new frontiers\u2014from quantum computing and AI acceleration to novel architectures and advanced interconnects."]

zoom.us.strategy_snippets: ["Covering all the bases: Major League Baseball\u2122 and Zoom partnership expands the employee-fan experience", "Whether you're chatting with teammates or supporting customers, Zoom makes it easier toconnect, collaborate, and reach goals \u2014 all with built-in AI doing the heavy lifting.", "\"It always comes down to 'I want to work on my business, not in my business.' Zoom AI Companion allows me to have that time back to do the work that only I can do.\"", "\"Zoom has allowed us to continue a tradition of really being a technology-focused company and making sure that we are using cutting-edge technology not only to advance our business but also for our fans.\"", "\"We are highly collaborative, we are people-centered, we are interested in moving ourselves and our goals to the next level. Zoom is, I believe, the ideal tool to suit the culture that we are and that we strive to be at Capital One.\""]

icebreaker.vc.thesis_evidence_title: Our team of Partners is with you throughout the Idea Stage and beyond.
icebreaker.vc.strategy_snippets: ["We've revamped our playbook. We\u2019re shortly introducing our learnings and focus here and will elaborate on these topics in coming blog posts.Tl;dr; results are great; more focused strategy to maximize returns; more partner-led portfolio time;We are actively investing as of Q4 2024!", "We are meeting a lot of amazing teams and we are still seeing a massive gap in idea-stage funding. During the last 7 years we have partnered up with 118 idea-stage teams. We\u2019ve learnt a lot and are dedicated to keep improving our support. This will continue to be our focus moving forward.", "Our new focus triples down on partner-level support per team. Our improved portfolio model allows us to provide new portfolio companies with a team of partners, not just one.", "Building a startup is tough, but success shouldn\u2019t come at the cost of health.Over the past five years, we\u2019ve focused on the well-being of our portfolio founders. There\u2019s a direct correlation between founder well-being and team health, which ultimately drives venture success.", "Our team of Partners is with you throughout the Idea Stage and beyond."]

a16z.com.strategy_snippets: ["In 2009, Marc Andreessen and Ben Horowitz built a16z on a single conviction: software would eat the world, and the biggest tech companies would become far more valuable than anyone believed. Since then, we have over $90B+ under management across multiple funds1.", "3We believe in the future and bet the firm that way.", "We are the best firm, so we expect to win with an equivalent or lower offer than anyone else bidding. Our mission is to invest in exceptional businesses that can stand the test of time. By understanding the potential of traditional businesses and their industries, we can contribute to sustainable positive change.", "Our investment approach is based on rigor, patience, and expertise, allowing us to invest for the long term.Our research allows us to uncover the obscure, connect emerging trends, and anticipate future needs to define true potential.Our knowledge is augmented by decades of investment insights.", "At Hillhouse, we believe that quality management teams are key to successful businesses; and strong alignment underpins investment success. Our goal is to align with resilient, forward-thinking organizations that create lasting value for their stakeholders."]

primevp.in.strategy_snippets: ["We are investors who understand the entrepreneurial journey", "Prime Venture Partners is an early-stage Venture Capital (VC) fund led by Sanjay Swamy, Shripati Acharya, Amit Somani & Brij Bhushan. We are often the first institutional investor in category-defining tech-startups.", "Prime started in 2012 with the objective of building world class companies out of India. It was originally called AngelPrime and renamed to Prime Venture Partners in 2015.", "Prime is led by partners with deep experience both as entrepreneurs and operators. We work closely with founders to understand the context of their business - be it in hiring, business strategy, sales, marketing, business model or fundraising.", "We do whatever it takes to make our companies successful. We have invested in over 50 companies and 95% of them are alive and well. We have 7 profitable exits and 1 IPO so far.\u00a0 We have only ever had 5 shutdowns."]

nea.com.strategy_snippets: ["For five decades, we\u2019ve served as\u00a0deeply engaged\u00a0partners to our founders delivering stability, meaningful support, and expert guidance as they set out to build the future. Whether it\u2019s rolling up our sleeves or serving as a sounding board, we\u2019re active collaborators every step of the way.", "From idea to IPO, we invest wherever we see the opportunity to generate meaningful and lasting impact.", "NEA was founded with the goal of supporting entrepreneurs not only over the lifetime of their company but over the lifetime of their entrepreneurial journey. We are investing in your company, yes, but we are also investing in you - today, and for what comes next.", "At NEA, we serve as foundational partners to courageous founders.", "We work as a team to leverage our collective expertise and offer wide-ranging support to our founders. We embrace curiosity, collaboration, and healthy debate in an effort to identify new opportunities and offer strategic counsel through a well-informed lens."]

vineventures.com.strategy_snippets: ["Culture:In an ideal world, VC firms have collaborative internal cultures, where partners are supportive of each other and each other\u2019s portfolio companies. Too often, however, VC firms inadvertently create highly competitive cultures, and partners operate out of self-interest.", "For certain stakeholders, the consequences are more obvious. For example, VC funds that are self-unoptimized will struggle to retain key talent and will produce poor returns \u2013 two outcomes that are clearly not ideal for the fund itself and its limited partners.", "To be clear, these asks are all super important. My point is not that founders should stop asking about customers, new hires, and industry-expertise. Rather, I believe founders should be asking more than that \u2013 specifically whether a VC firm knows how to run itself.", "It\u2019s just not on every GPs radar. I genuinely believe a lot of managers simply don\u2019t think about these dynamics.", "The Vine crew know how to be useful. They can help you get next round investors, source key hires, and support you in hard times.They\u2019re low ego, do the work types, who won\u2019t waste a minute of your time.They\u2019re perfect extensions of any founding team building in healthcare."]

ycombinator.com.strategy_snippets: ["YC invests $500,000 in every company on standard terms. Our $500K investment is made on 2 separate safes:", "We invest $125,000 on a post-money safe in return for 7% of your company (the \"$125k safe\")", "We invest $375,000 on an uncapped safe with a Most Favored Nation (\"MFN\") provision (the \"MFN safe\")", "During the batch, startups are sorted into 3 groups. Each group is led by YC partners who advise the founders in one-on-one and group office hours. Each group is split into sections (6-10 companies), so that founders get the benefit of an intimate setting within the larger batch.", "Much of what takes place at YC happens during office hours. Partners host group office hours every two weeks and one-on-one office hours as often as founders want. What startups talk about at office hours depends on the stage of the company and where they are in the YC cycle."]
